code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  mut product = 1
  if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut i = 0
    while i < parts.len()
      let part_opt = parts.get(i)
      let part = match part_opt
      when Some(p)
        p
      when None
        ""
      end
      let n_opt = string.parse_int(part)
      let n = match n_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      product = product * n
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  print("product=#{product}")
  Ok(())
end
